raw_consumer_statement:
I reported two unauthorized subscription charges from the merchant " XXXX '' for {$320.00} ( XXXX ) and {$320.00} ( XXXX ). 

XXXX resolved the XXXX claim ( Ref : XXXX ) and issued a credit instantly. 

For the XXXX claim, the service was disastrous. After multiple transfers, an agent sent me a confirmation email that deliberately omitted the refund amount and failed to mention the credit request entirely, effectively providing an empty claim number to dismiss my case. 

Only after I spent another hour escalating to a supervisor was the correct amount of {$320.00} finally acknowledged under a new Reference ( XXXX ). However, the supervisor still refused to issue the manual temporary credit, forcing a 30-day wait.
